rules.name: Jump Squat Ballistic Loading Cap
rules.description: Jump squats must be loaded in the speed-strength/velocity zone (30-40% 1RM) to preserve rate of force development.
rules.error_message: Jump squat intensity exceeds the speed-strength threshold of 45% 1RM.

rules.name: Medicine Ball Weight Prescription
rules.description: Medicine ball exercises must prescribe load via ball mass (e.g., 2-5 kg) and not % 1RM.
rules.error_message: Medicine ball throws must be prescribed by ball weight or effort, not % 1RM.

rules.name: Isometric Core Duration & Load Constraints
rules.description: Planks and isometric core holds must use bodyweight or static tension parameters, not % 1RM.
rules.error_message: Isometric core holds cannot be loaded via % 1RM.

rules.name: Nordic Hamstring Curl Safety Volume Cap
rules.description: Nordic Hamstring Curls are highly taxing eccentrically and must be capped at 5 reps per set to prevent hamstring strains.
rules.error_message: Nordic Hamstring Curls exceed the safety threshold of 5 reps per set or use inappropriate % 1RM loading.

rules.name: Weekly Exercise Monotony Cap
rules.description: An exercise cannot be repeated across every session in a weekly microcycle to prevent pattern accommodation.
rules.error_message: Exercise is repeated too frequently within the weekly microcycle, causing pattern monotony.

rules.name: Primary CNS Exercise Contrast Pairing
rules.description: Primary power and strength movements should be paired with mobility drills or low-load velocity contrast movements (PAP) to optimize CNS recovery.
rules.error_message: Primary exercises must be paired in a superset (A1/A2) with a recovery, mobility, or contrast movement.
